positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a cozy forest scene at twilight. The central elements include a group of small, bioluminescent woodland animals (fox, owl, bunny) huddled together near a glowing stream. Giant, oversized, fantastical mushrooms cast soft, warm, ethereal light. Include winding vines, hanging glowing fireflies, and soft, mist-covered moss. The style should be 'Studio Ghibli meets Nordic folk art,' featuring thick, clean line work, high contrast silhouettes against a moody gradient background (deep indigo to forest green). The overall composition must be centered and highly detailed, suitable for an embroidered or screen-printed apparel print. Volumetric lighting, depth of field, clean vectors, vibrant yet soothing color palette.
negative: blur, fuzzy, grainy, low detail, text, watermark, logo, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, disfigured, noise, signature, grayscale
